languages.text: "Я не разделяю ваши взгляды на управление протекторатом, но история расставит все по своим местам".
"I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."
languages.original_text: "Я не разделяю ваши взгляды на управление протекторатом, но история расставит все по своим местам".

traits.locale_text: {nc|"The feeling is mutual, my heir. Your rule will glorify the dynasty even in these dark times."|"I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."}
{nc|"The feeling is mutual, my heir. Your rule will glorify the dynasty even in these dark times."|"I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."}
{nc|"The feeling is mutual, my heir. Your rule will glorify the dynasty even in these dark times."|"I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."}
{nc|"The feeling is mutual, my heir. Your rule will glorify the dynasty even in these dark times."|"I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."}

languages.text: "Ich würde das Protektorat anders regieren als Ihr, aber die Geschichte wird alles regeln."
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: {nc|"Das sehe ich genauso, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Eure Herrschaft wird der Dynastie selbst in diesen dunklen Zeiten zur Ehre gereichen."|"Ich würde das Protektorat anders regieren als Ihr, aber die Geschichte wird alles regeln."}

languages.text: « Je ne partage pas votre vision du protectorat, mais l'histoire nous dira qui de nous deux avait raison. »
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: {nc|« Le sentiment est réciproque, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Votre règne fera la gloire de notre dynastie, malgré les errances de cette époque. »|« Je ne partage pas votre vision du protectorat, mais l'histoire nous dira qui de nous deux avait raison. »}

languages.text: «No comparto su visión de gobierno para el protectorado, pero la historia determinará quién tenía razón».
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: {nc|«El sentimiento es mutuo, hereder{mf|o|a}. Su gobierno traerá la gloria a la dinastía incluso en estos tiempos oscuros».|«No comparto su visión de gobierno para el protectorado, pero la historia determinará quién tenía razón».}

languages.text: "Protektorayı yönetme konusundaki görüşlerini paylaşmıyorum ancak zaman her şeyi çözecektir."
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: {nc|"Duygularımız karşılıklı vârisim. İdaren, bu karanlık zamanlarda bile hanedanlığı yüceltecektir."|"Protektorayı yönetme konusundaki görüşlerini paylaşmıyorum ancak zaman her şeyi çözecektir."}

languages.text: “我并不认同你治理属地的观点，但历史会给出答案。”
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: {nc|“我亦有同感，我的继承人。即使身处这样黑暗的时刻，你的统治也会为王朝带去荣光。”|“我并不认同你治理属地的观点，但历史会给出答案。”}

languages.text: 「保護国を統治するあなたの考えには賛同できませんが、歴史はすべてを判断してくれるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "I do not share your views on ruling the protectorate, but history will sort everything out."

traits.locale_text: 「保護国を統治するあなたの考えには賛同できませんが、歴史はすべてを判断してくれるでしょう。」
